tweet.text:
RT @DariusJButler: Mama there goes that man again. PS 2️⃣ #BroncosCountry
https://t.co/4t4aMjtYSG

RT @RShermanPodcast: Tomorrow's episode will be anything but "BLAND" 👀
@RSherman_25 x Travis Hunter 12pm PT / 3pm ET Subscribe to our You…
RT @RShermanPodcast: .@RSherman_25 & Colorado star Travis Hunter clear the air about Richard's "bland" comment & discuss Travis' bond with…
RT @RShermanPodcast: .@RSherman_25 and Travis Hunter clear the air about Richard's viral comment where he (allegedly) called the Colorado s…
RT @NFLonPrime: It's a meeting of two of Sherm's former teams on #TNFonPrime 👀 https://t.co/9XuyBMmsJC

RT @RShermanPodcast: "He's like a father figure to me"
Travis Hunter talks to @RSherman_25 about his bond with Colorado head coach Deion S…
RT @D7_Reed: 💼✊🏾
@ChrisHarrisJr You know it’s all love. We have all had tough games. It’s all about the mindset
Wow. I haven’t seen many plays they got so wrong after a review. Strange.
I like the Shenault redemption arc.
Congrats brother! One of the best to do it. In the slot and outside. https://t.co/R8TSNq8Znx
Great to see Caleb Williams given more creativity in the play calling. Hes getting the ball out quicker not allowing the D line to tee off. Screen game setting up TD passes. Growth in a lot of areas.

There are some COOL plays being run by the Washington Commanders! I don’t know if I have seen some of these concepts EVER! Flea Flicker screen?! Fake swing screen to a tunnel screen?!. Love to see new things in this game.
RT @RShermanPodcast: The Lions were ALL-IN on running up the score vs. the Cowboys on Sunday @RSherman_25 https://t.co/s0NZRCd3lD
RT @RShermanPodcast: .@RSherman_25 has seen "HUGE growth and HUGE improvement" from Caleb Williams during Chicago's three-game winning stre…
Hope the @nyjets make the playoffs just to show that everything Saleh did worked and he just needed a good QB and playcaller. Players loved him and his defense is highly ranked.
Wonder how tough it was for Brich to suddenly have so much more on his plate on top of calling the Defense. Sure that was an adjustment but they look good tonight.
That was as BS of a P.I. call as I have seen. And the explanation was even worse because that’s not the rule. The rule is you cannot turn the WR and he didn’t.
Aaron is the master of the Hail Mary. Never see anyone else have this much success on it https://t.co/HOCDJrvKv9
Bro wtf!!! How can they call that P.I. On @D7_Reed?! The WR runs into him as he’s looking for the ball. Like come on!
These refs are bias tonight. I don’t use that lightly but it’s apparent. These aren’t my teams but these calls don’t make sense. I see similar contact from buffalo DBs and nothing being called.
Someone send me the play please because I can’t find it. You can clearly see the WR jump into him. https://t.co/KhrnDZdnE0
They have to be better than this especially in Prinetime. New York needs to call down and tell them to settle down.
Now the make up calls.
Another bs P.I. Call! This time on Buffalo. Smh like come on refs get out the way!
RT @RShermanPodcast: .@RSherman_25 reacts to the Raiders trading Davante Adams to the Jets & Woody Johnson's comments about "building a cul…
